name: jump_cut_detect
description: Detect jump cut issues: long pauses, stutters, and false starts. Outputs timestamps and types — advisory only, does not modify video.

output.description: JSON with issues array — each item has start, end, type (pause|stutter|false_start), and optional text

params.name: noise
params.description: Silence noise floor in dB (e.g. -30 for -30dB)

params.name: min-pause
params.description: Minimum silence duration to flag as a pause (seconds)

params.name: model
params.description: Whisper model for stutter and false-start detection. 'none' runs pause detection only (no model required).
